comments.author: @dietandfitness1086
comments.text: Watching this makes me want to go back immediately 💙 The Amalfi Coast was one of the few places that genuinely exceeded my expectations. Reading Wonders Along the Amalfi Coast by Daniel Crosswell beforehand made such a difference because it helped me travel with confidence instead of feeling lost trying to plan everything on the spot.

comments.author: @drsjwhitman45
comments.text: The last Italy to a couple 55 years together we rented a car in Rome and avoided the big cities. Found my father’s battle grounds in Alta Villa - south of Naples. Then Pietro village between Monte casino on way down to Napoli and then a week on Capri and another on Sorreno. Then turned east to the Adriatic Sea starting from the heal of the east coast at boot heel then north till east of Rome. Dreams forever.
